description: tldraw provides an SDK for building collaborative infinite-canvas and whiteboard applications. It also offers an MCP App that lets AI agents draw and edit a tldraw canvas inside MCP-enabled clients.
summary: tldraw.workers.dev exposes a known MCP server endpoint for the tldraw MCP App at `https://tldraw-mcp-app.tldraw.workers.dev/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI surface for this domain was found.
